ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is the time, in milliseconds, after you stop typing/stop selecting things that the search occurs (debounce timeout)
ast.target: 这是您停止输入/停止选择后，搜索发生的时间（以毫秒为单位）（防抖超时）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is the time, in milliseconds, after you stop searching that the index refreshes i.e. changes to the searchable content are loaded into the search index (debounce timeout)
ast.target: 这是您停止搜索后，索引刷新的时间（以毫秒为单位），即可搜索内容的更改将被加载到搜索索引中（防抖超时）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For search on type, queries are built from blocks of text surrounded by whitespace if true and individual lines if false (RESTART REQUIRED TO ENACT CHANGES)
ast.target: 对于输入即搜索，如果为 true，则查询由空白包围的文本块构建；如果为 false，则由单行构建（需要重启才能生效）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of results shown per search result page
ast.target: 每个搜索结果页面显示的结果数量。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No indexes activated! They can be activated in the Power Search settings tab.
ast.target: 未激活任何索引！可以在 Power Search 设置选项卡中激活它们。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No results found! Start highlighting text/typing to try to find results or check for any errors in loading indexes (in a notice that pops up a few times or the console)
ast.target: 未找到结果！开始高亮文本/输入以尝试查找结果，或检查加载索引时是否有任何错误（在弹出几次的通知或控制台中）。
